title: microchilus decorus
intro: Microchilus decorus is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the 'Yellow Bells'. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Microchilus decorus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain diseases due to its antioxidant and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
